# Lizard Tail

## Observed Text

- When your HP would be reduced to 0, heal to 50% of your Max HP instead (works once).

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong low-HP safety relic; it can justify smithing or taking a safer non-rest route only when the next threats are otherwise covered.
- MCP live relic lists can still display Lizard Tail after it was consumed earlier in the run; verify one-shot availability from run history before counting it in lethal math.
